classification_model.Core: Padrão absorvido e mantido pelo Atlas.
classification_model.Inspiration Only: Fonte de padrões, sem dependência ou redistribuição literal.

items.name: Spec-driven Development
items.risk: Blueprint overlap and documentation overhead
items.recommendation: Merge specification workflow with Atlas Discovery and Blueprint locks.

items.name: Source-driven Development
items.risk: Remote source drift and prompt injection
items.recommendation: Require authoritative sources, snapshots, hashes and audit citations.

items.name: Verification Before Completion
items.risk: Opinionated parent framework
items.recommendation: Adopt the evidence contract without adopting the full orchestration framework.

items.name: Systematic Debugging
items.risk: Excessive rigor for trivial failures
items.recommendation: Route to different rigor levels based on risk.

items.name: Test-driven Development
items.risk: Rigid TDD is not suitable for every task
items.recommendation: Use an adaptive policy with audited exceptions.

items.name: API and Interface Design
items.risk: Contract may not reflect actual consumers
items.recommendation: Add versioning, compatibility and consumer tests.

items.name: Code Review and Quality
items.risk: Duplicate findings and review noise
items.recommendation: Normalize and prioritize semantic, SAST and human findings.

items.name: Context Engineering
items.risk: Context bloat and conflicting instructions
items.recommendation: Use as the basis of selective skill routing.

items.name: Semgrep Code Security
items.format: Agent Skill generated from Semgrep rules
items.risk: Non-standard source license and false positives
items.recommendation: Use rule identifiers or adapter results; do not vendor text without legal review.

items.name: OWASP ASVS
items.risk: Attribution and share-alike requirements
items.recommendation: Map ASVS IDs to Atlas controls with explicit attribution and license boundaries.

items.name: Playwright MCP
items.license: Repository license; pin and verify at admission
items.risk: External navigation, data exposure and irreversible clicks
items.recommendation: Isolate browser, allowlist origins and gate external side effects.

items.name: Chrome DevTools MCP
items.risk: Telemetry and authenticated session exposure
items.recommendation: Use slim, isolated/headless mode and disable telemetry by policy.

items.name: Vercel React Best Practices
items.risk: Framework-specific guidance can age
items.recommendation: Version a Next.js/React profile and activate only for matching stacks.

items.name: Vercel Web Design Guidelines
items.risk: Upstream runtime fetch creates instruction drift
items.recommendation: Ship a vetted snapshot; never fetch mutable instructions during execution.

items.name: Supabase Postgres Best Practices
items.risk: Workload-dependent advice and destructive SQL
items.recommendation: Require EXPLAIN, reversible migration and write approval.

items.name: Supabase MCP
items.license: Service and repository terms; verify at admission
items.risk: Broad project, schema and data access
items.recommendation: Project-scoped, read-only by default and development branch first.

items.name: Snyk Agent Scan
items.risk: MCP scan may start stdio commands and API may receive metadata
items.recommendation: Static/offline admission first; explicit consent for execution or upload.

items.name: SonarQube MCP Server
items.license: Repository license; verify exact pinned version
items.risk: Code finding exposure and commercial feature dependencies
items.recommendation: Read-only toolset and normalized Engineering Score findings.

items.name: CodeQL Action
items.license: MIT for Action; CodeQL private use subject to GitHub terms
items.risk: Private repository entitlement and duplicated SAST findings
items.recommendation: Use as a GitHub CI gate and deduplicate imported SARIF.

items.name: GitHub MCP Server
items.risk: Broad token can mutate source, workflows and repository settings
items.recommendation: Use fine-grained token and separate approval for push, merge and workflow writes.

items.name: Anthropic MCP Builder
items.risk: Overlap with Atlas plugin architecture
items.recommendation: Absorb tool ergonomics and safety criteria into Atlas-owned SDK guidance.

items.name: Postman MCP Server
items.risk: API keys and collections may contain secrets
items.recommendation: Allowlist workspaces/collections, redact secrets and preview mutations.

items.name: Anthropic Webapp Testing
items.risk: Duplicates browser QA orchestration
items.recommendation: Merge useful scenarios into Atlas Browser QA instead of shipping a second workflow.

items.name: Vercel Composition Patterns
items.risk: Over-abstraction when applied indiscriminately
items.recommendation: Activate only when component complexity/reuse signals justify it.

items.name: Anthropic Frontend Design
items.risk: Subjective advice can conflict with the local design system
items.recommendation: Use principles only; local tokens and components always take precedence.

items.name: Vercel Before and After
items.license: Vercel agent-skills repository terms; pin exact source
items.risk: PII in screenshots and unstable visual diffs
items.recommendation: Fix viewport/fonts, mask sensitive data and version baselines.

items.name: Performance Optimization
items.risk: Premature optimization and invalid benchmarks
items.recommendation: Require baseline, budget and comparable evidence.

items.name: CI/CD and Automation
items.risk: Secret leaks and unauthorized publish/deploy
items.recommendation: Plan with dry-run; gate all external writes through adapters.

items.name: Terraform MCP Server
items.risk: Infrastructure changes and documented local-use constraint
items.recommendation: Disable operations by default, sign plans and approve applies.

items.name: Kubernetes MCP Server
items.risk: Delete, exec, secrets and wrong cluster context
items.recommendation: Namespace/RBAC minimum, read-only default and dual production approval.

items.name: Docker MCP Toolkit
items.risk: Catalog broadens supply-chain and execution surface
items.recommendation: Use isolation and consent patterns as reference; do not make it mandatory.

items.name: AWS Agent Skills
items.license: Toolkit reported Apache-2.0; verify exact artifact
items.risk: Cloud cost, destructive commands and credential exposure
items.recommendation: Selective AWS service index, read-only/dry-run and explicit IAM policy.

items.name: Microsoft Azure Agent Skills
items.risk: Context bloat, provider lock-in and resource creation
items.recommendation: Load only selected service skills and gate all mutations.

items.name: Cloudflare Skills
items.risk: Provider specificity and external deployments
items.recommendation: Activate only after stack detection and gate deploy/storage writes.

items.name: Google Cloud MCP
items.risk: Examples are not officially supported product; IAM and cost risk
items.recommendation: Prefer managed servers and require project/region declaration.

items.name: MCP Toolbox for Databases
items.risk: Arbitrary query, exfiltration and write access
items.recommendation: Allowlisted query tools, read-only credentials, timeouts and row limits.

items.name: dbt MCP
items.risk: Expensive queries and sensitive metric/data access
items.recommendation: Separate metadata/lineage from execution and govern cost/environment.

items.name: Sentry MCP
items.risk: Production event PII, tokens and payload exposure
items.recommendation: Redact sensitive fields and scope project/environment read-only.

items.name: Grafana MCP
items.risk: Sensitive telemetry and expensive queries
items.recommendation: Use read-only service account and window/cardinality limits.

items.name: Microsoft Cloud Solution Architect
items.risk: Azure bias and overlap with provider packs
items.recommendation: Extract provider-neutral architecture checks into Atlas-owned guidance.

items.name: Interview Me
items.risk: Question overload and sensitive user responses
items.recommendation: Use adaptive discovery depth and record unknowns/decisions.

items.name: Idea Refine
items.risk: Invented scope and synthetic user evidence
items.recommendation: Mark hypotheses separately from validated evidence.

items.name: Planning and Task Breakdown
items.risk: Excessive task fragmentation and parallel write conflicts
items.recommendation: Generate ownership, dependencies, acceptance criteria and write zones.

items.name: Anthropic Doc Coauthoring
items.risk: License variance and duplicate sources of truth
items.recommendation: Generate living docs from Blueprint/ADR and validate drift.

items.name: Context7
items.risk: Remote content trust and project query disclosure
items.recommendation: Lookup on demand only; record domain, version and citations.

items.name: Hugging Face Agent Skills
items.license: Apache-2.0 repository; verify model/dataset licenses separately
items.risk: Data upload, compute cost and heterogeneous artifact licenses
items.recommendation: Separate dataset, evaluation and training profiles with budgets and data policy.

items.name: Figma MCP Server
items.risk: Beta write support, proprietary design data and possible usage cost
items.recommendation: Read-first, file/node scoped and preview all canvas writes.

items.name: Linear MCP Server
items.risk: Issue mutation and notifications to collaborators
items.recommendation: Read/sync by default; preview comments and bulk mutations.

items.name: Atlassian Rovo MCP
items.risk: Broad enterprise data, rate limits and regulatory limitations
items.recommendation: Allowlist sites/projects and block incompatible regulated environments.

items.name: Notion MCP
items.risk: Broad workspace access and shared document mutation
items.recommendation: Explicit roots, read-only default and diff before publishing.
